title: Error reading properties in production mode
symptom: The workflow fails in production mode with the error 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'execute')', while it runs perfectly in test mode.
applies_when: Using nodes that may not initialize correctly
not_this_if: Error does not occur in test mode
No nodes are involved that could cause initialization issues
root_cause: This error typically arises when a node is not properly initialized or referenced in the production environment, which can differ from the test environment. It may be related to how certain nodes handle execution context or dependencies.
fix_steps: Verify that all nodes are correctly configured and initialized
Test the workflow again in production mode
agent_instruction: Upgrade n8n to version 1.99 and re-test the workflow in production mode.
